thank you, rozu, voodoo doll and galeroar for the answers!! ok wow i see, so our charas get significantly stronger later into the game, bc seeing that 2-3k hp is considered as not very high hp is very bonkers for me currently. i shall focus on trying to get more charas!
which comes to the question: if i'm new, i should focus on spending gacha currency on getting charas first for base teams in all colors, rather than getting wheels of destinies, right?
it seems like you want to focus on getting a strong comp then get core wheels for that comp and then spend rolls on getting other units
since the game gives you three(?) free chosen dupes, one of which can be used on limited characters(e.g. salvador or hameln)
focus on getting one team strong enough to clear the story then start building up other teams
if you don't want to worry about what dupes to get you can probably just stick with your first four units since they all get super free limit breaks
story is important because thats where all your account exp is locked behind which determines how much max hp you have

For me Aequor has the best standard units
Goliath: good aoe dmg, good nuke dmg, good stat.
Caecus: unique counter playstyle with tentacle, has a good ult recharge skill, his strike can deal big dmg when you have high retail stacks.
Faros: can generate temp tentacles, can apply poison with tentacle attack, her strike also can deal 1 tentacle attack. If you unlock her Overburst you can increase hand limit.
Celeste: your insurance, all of her card can deal tentacle dmg but you need high realm mastery to make her consitent. She’s has a revive in her ult.
Sanga: a weird tank and dmg dealer. Her ult hits hard if your death res and shield is high. The only unit can generate tentacle in her card, but you need 4 cost to do that.

Except Sanga, the other four’s awaken card will generate 1 tentacle
Sanga’s awken increase tentacle limit by 1
